name: Herbed Zucchini
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 teaspoons snipped fresh sage or 1/2 teaspoon rubbed sage
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a skillet over medium heat until crisp. Remove the bacon and discard all but 1 tablespoon of drippings.
2. In the same skillet, sauté onion, celery, and garlic in the remaining drippings until tender.
3. Add tomatoes, zucchini, parsley, and seasonings. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 6-8 minutes or until zucchini is tender.
5. Sprinkle with cheeses and bacon. Serve with a slotted spoon.
